category_sources: Official SourceForge project page and source archive identify libbs2b as the bs2b audio/DSP library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official bs2b SourceForge project site.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project homepage is the best official documentation surface found for libbs2b.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is an official SourceForge download, but no official source-control repository URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists bs2bconvert and bs2bstream tools.
